source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in <image>, \( I_1 = 80 \text{ mA} \) and \( I_2 = 4 \text{ mA} \). Transistors \( T_1 \) and \( T_2 \) are identical. Assume that the thermal voltage \( V_T \) is 26 mV at \( 27^\circ \text{C} \). At \( 50^\circ \text{C} \), the value of the voltage \( V_{12} = V_1 - V_2 \) (in mV) is
